title: Enchanted Golden Apple Crafting
description: This mod adds back the Enchanted Golden Apple crafting recipe
body:
**Enchanted Golden Apple Crafting**
=====================================
This mod adds back the crafting recipe for the Enchanted Golden Apple

Crafting Recipe:
- 8 Gold blocks
- 1 Apple
  
![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c993e11858737d9c309004ab01dc5ee2bca7485d.png)

_**Note**_:

- The items in the recipe are the old textures
